principles: Data Density over Whitespace: Unlike marketing sites, this tool needs density. Think cockpit instruments.
High Contrast: Green/Amber on Black. No subtle grays.
Functionality as Aesthetic: The grid lines, the coordinates, the status indicators ARE the decoration.
Immediate Feedback: Inputs trigger instant calculation updates where possible.

typography.secondary_font: JetBrains Mono (for ALL data, coordinates, and inputs)
typography.heading_font: Rajdhani or Share Tech Mono (Import from Google Fonts)
rules: Use Monospace for all numerical data and Grid Locators.
Headings should be uppercase and tracking-widest.
Labels should be small (text-xs) and uppercase.

sections.header: col-span-full h-16 flex items-center justify-between border-b border-border bg-background/95 backdrop-blur
sections.input_panel: col-span-full md:col-span-4 lg:col-span-3 row-span-2 bg-card border border-border p-4 flex flex-col gap-6
sections.main_display: col-span-full md:col-span-8 lg:col-span-9 h-[500px] bg-black border border-border relative overflow-hidden
sections.metrics_bar: col-span-full md:col-span-8 lg:col-span-9 grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4

buttons.classes: rounded-none border-primary/50 text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-black uppercase tracking-wider font-mono transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(0,255,65,0.1)] hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,255,65,0.4)]

inputs.classes: rounded-none bg-black border-border focus:border-primary font-mono text-lg tracking-widest uppercase focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50

status_indicators.classes: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase border

visual_enhancers.corner_brackets: Use absolute positioned borders on corners of containers to simulate a viewfinder.
visual_enhancers.scanlines: Optional: overlay with pointer-events-none opacity-5 bg-repeat-y bg-[url('https://transparenttextures.com/patterns/black-scales.png')] or similar scanline css.

images.instructions: No external images required. Use CSS patterns and icons.

universal_guidelines: ALL interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
Ensure input validation for Maidenhead locators (e.g., regex pattern).
Persist user inputs to localStorage immediately on change.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Update tailwind.config.js with the Tactical color palette and font families.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Create a 'Layout' component that implements the tactical grid and scanline effects.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Build the 'LocatorInput' component with regex validation and auto-formatting.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Implement the 'ProfileChart' using Plotly, ensuring it handles the dark theme correctly.
